creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 237891
Screenshot: an apparently unsubmitted done comment by Pau Amma, with a response from me

In the attached screenshot: <https://reviews.freebsd.org/D37235#inline-228496>, apparently unsubmitted. From conversation in IRC with the author (pauamma) of this inline comment, I _do_ believe that the 'Submit' button was used to add the comment; to make it visible and available for response. 

Elsewhere in the same review: <https://reviews.freebsd.org/D37235#inline-228542> from gjb, apparently unsubmitted, with my submitted response …

… and so on.
